properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v5 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Chains are broken, 'cause You have spoken, It is finished on the cross,

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Now I'm living in Your freedom, Jesus You have set me free,

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: By the power of Your Spirit, Every captive is released,

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For this purpose, I am living, Jesus You have set me free,

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Nothing's going to hold me back, No, nothing's going to keep me down, Jesus has set me free, I'm free indeed.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I will give You praise With everything I am I'll praise, Whatever may come my way, You have won the victory, You set me free.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I'm surrounded by Your goodness, I am covered by Your grace,

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: My heart is grateful, forever thankful, 'Cause Jesus You have set me free.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: We are free, we are free And we have the victory. We are free, we are free And we have the victory.
